title: Helpfully Optimised
description: This modpack contains mods that I personally like to use and would be a good starting point for your potato. I would still recommend it even if you are using a great pc as the optimisations always help.
body:
# What Is The Purpose Of This Modpack?
This modpack is built so that your pc will be able to run minecraft better and look good. It has some popular performance mods and shader compatibility. There may be some compatibility issues, but they are always expected. I made this as a fun little project so I might not update it that much, but I will try. I hope that you will have fun!

Join the official Discord: [https://discord.gg/834rfbj6qf](https://discord.gg/834rfbj6qf)

**Your game should definitely be playable, though it might need some adjusting for an optimal experience.**
## What's Inside?
- **Animatica**
Adds support for resource packs that use custom animated textures
- **Continuity**
Allows for effecient connected textures
- **Debugify**
Fixes over 70 bugs found on the Minecraft bug tracker
- **Dynamic FPS**
Reduces the amount of resources Minecraft uses while in the background
- **Enhanced Block Entities**
Increases the performance of block entity rendering
- **Fabric API**
Contains essential features for fabric mods
- **Ferrite Core**
Reduces the RAM usage of Minecraft
- **Immediately Fast**
Improves immediate mode rendering
- **Indium**
Addon to Sodium to provide support for the Fabric Rendering API
- **Iris Shaders**
A shaders mod that allows for the use of shaders
- **Lamb Dynamic Lights**
Adds dynamic lights
- **Lithium**
A general purpose optimisation mod
- **Modern Fix**
A mod that contains a series of tweaks for optimisation
- **Reese's Sodium Options**
Improves of the UI of Sodium's options screen
- **Sodium**
Popular rendering engine mod
- **Sodium Extra**
Adds extra settings for better optimisation
- **Starlight**
Rewrites the lighting engine to improve performance
- **Bad Optimisations (v1.0.1+)**
A collection of small optimisations
- **Chunky (v1.0.1+)**
Pre-generates chunks efficiently
- **Cloth Config API (v1.0.1+)**
An API for config screens
- **Complete Config (v1.0.1+)**
A configuration library for fabric mods
- **Concurent Chunk Management Engine (v1.0.1+)**
A mod to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft
- **Cull Leaves (v1.0.1+)**
Adds culling to leaf blocks
- **Krypton (v1.0.1+)**
Optimises the Minecraft networking stack
- **More Culling (v1.0.1+)**
Changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance
- **No Weather Effects (v1.0.1+)**
Disables client-side weather effects
- **Noxesium (v1.0.1+)**
Improves client performance on large multiplayer servers
### Why Use Helpfully Optimised?
I have picked all of these mods for an easy optimised experience that won't be much of a hassle so that you can just enjoy playing. This is just for the people that want a good Minecraft experience out of the box.
